meaning: 9haIdrEJme`tAltE`l\:dVIkEl/adjEdVI/n.湿法冶金.湿法冶金学[术]的/术]
examples: The on-line element analysis in hydrometallurgical process is introduced in this paper.
It turns out that the method can be applied to uranium hydrometallurgical process effectively.
Mechanical activation is one of the most important methods to enhance the hydrometallurgical processes.
